name: Hopping John
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon to 1 tablespoon Old Bay seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the pressure cooker with water and turn the burner to high. Stir in the spices.
2. Rinse the rices and add them to the cooker. Throw in the black-eyed peas, greens, and stewed tomatoes.
3. Bring to a simmer on top of the stove, stirring occasionally, until the frozen ingredients have thawed somewhat and the greens are separated.
4. Lock the lid securely and bring the cooker to high pressure. Cook at high pressure for 30 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat source and allow for natural pressure release.
6. Adjust seasoning as needed. Tobasco sauce is recommended on the table.
Menu suggestions:
- Spicy tomato soup (including a recipe with peanut butter)
- Tossed salad with romaine lettuce, canned beets, and artichoke hearts - raspberry vinaigrette dressing
- Corn bread or garlic bread
- Baked onion side dish
